description: You are the Director of Residential Life at Hillcrest College. Convert the contemporary villa shell (exterior walls and basic room outlines) in Sweet Home 3D into a functional 16-student dormitory floor. The design must include at least 5 new interior walls and 4 doors to subdivide the space. Define and name at least 5 rooms (e.g., 'Dorm Room', 'Lounge', 'Bathroom'). Furnish the sleeping quarters with 16 beds, 8 desks, 8 chairs, and 4 shelves/wardrobes. Equip the bathrooms with 4 toilets and 4 sinks. The common lounge must include 2 sofas, 2 tables, and 2 lamps, and the communal kitchen requires 3 appliances and 1 dining table. Save the completed project

metadata.occupation: Director of Residential Life / Facilities Planner
